name: Fast Cash and Pawn Shop
description_short: Family-owned pawn shop chain with 5 locations in the Chicago suburbs. Offers fast cash loans and purchases on jewelry, gold, watches, diamonds, and other items.
description_long:
Fast Cash and Pawn is a family-owned pawn shop operator serving the western suburbs of Chicago with five locations in Naperville, Warrenville, Aurora, Carpentersville, and Lyons, Illinois. The company has been established to serve customers who need quick cash through collateral-based lending and asset sales.

The company offers two primary services: pawn loans (collateral-based short-term loans with repayment terms between 60 and 365 days) and direct purchase of items. They specialize in high-value items including gold, jewelry, diamonds, watches, and other items of value. Loans can be obtained in minutes, and the company advertises competitive loan amounts compared to competitors.

Fast Cash and Pawn differentiates itself through family ownership and a stated commitment to treating customers with dignity and respect. Their marketing emphasizes understanding financial hardship and employing staff with personal experience using pawn services. The physical stores are described as well-lit, warm, and inviting. The company offers free estimates on items customers wish to sell or loan against, and provides expedited cash disbursement.

However, potential borrowers should carefully review the loan terms disclosed on their website. The APR of 360% is extremely high and reflects the short-term, high-risk nature of pawn lending. A $100 loan costs $20 in fees if repaid within 30 days, demonstrating the substantial cost of capital through this channel. While appropriate for true emergency situations requiring immediate cash, pawn loans should be considered a last resort rather than a standard borrowing method.
pros: Five convenient locations across Chicago western suburbs for accessibility
Cash available within minutes of loan approval or sale agreement
Free estimates provided on items before committing to loan or sale
Loan terms range from 60-365 days, providing some flexibility in repayment schedules
Family-owned business with stated commitment to treating customers fairly and with dignity
No credit check required—purely collateral-based lending
Accepts wide variety of items including jewelry, gold, diamonds, watches, and other valuables
cons: 360% APR is among the highest possible interest rates, making loans extremely expensive
$20 fee on a $100 loan represents 20% cost within 30 days alone
Short minimum loan term (60 days) means borrowers must repay quickly or face renewal/rollover costs
As a pawn shop, losing collateral if unable to repay means loss of personal property
No alternative products offered—only pawn loans and asset sales, no traditional personal loans
best_for: Individuals with immediate cash needs who own valuable items (jewelry, gold, watches) and can afford repayment within 60-365 days
People who cannot qualify for traditional loans and need emergency cash within minutes
Those looking to sell valuable items quickly at pre-owned pricing without lengthy sales processes
diagnosis: Fast Cash and Pawn is appropriate for consumers facing genuine emergencies who own valuable collateral and can repay within 60-365 days. The critical caveat is the 360% APR structure: borrowers should carefully calculate total costs and exhaust all other options (friends, family, credit unions, credit cards) before using this service, as the expense is substantial even for short-term loans.
services: Pawn loans on jewelry with 60-365 day repayment terms
Pawn loans on watches and timepieces
Pawn loans on diamonds and gemstones
Pawn loans on gold and precious metals
Pawn loans on other items of value
Direct purchase and cash payment for gold and jewelry
Direct purchase and cash payment for diamonds
Direct purchase and cash payment for watches
Buy and sell pre-owned inventory items
